prompt: Flat design image, exactly 1024x1024 pixels, NO rounded corners, NO border, NO padding. The ENTIRE image is filled with solid burnt orange (#bf5700) background extending to every edge. Centered stylized cheeseburger in flat illustration style: light peachy-tan dome top bun with small white sesame seeds (clean, no checkmark on bun), wavy bright green lettuce strip, golden yellow draped melted cheese, dark brown flat patty, flat peachy-tan bottom bun. In the bottom-right overlapping the burger, a small circular badge with cream fill, thin burnt orange border, and bold burnt orange checkmark inside. This is for an iOS app icon — the OS applies rounding, so the source image MUST be a perfect square filled edge-to-edge with no rounded corners or borders.
